name_it: Saint Catherine of Siena, virgin and doctor of the Church
name_en: Saint Catherine of Siena, virgin and doctor of the Church
name_es: Saint Catherine of Siena, virgin and doctor of the Church
name_pt: Saint Catherine of Siena, virgin and doctor of the Church
bio_en: Caterina di Jacopo di Benincasa, known as Catherine of Siena, was an Italian mystic and pious laywoman who engaged in papal and Italian politics through extensive letter-writing and advocacy. Canonized in 1461, she is revered as a saint and as a Doctor of the Church due to her extensive theological authorship. She is also considered to have influenced Italian literature.
